title: helichrysum pendulum subsp. fontanesii
intro: Helichrysum pendulum subsp. fontanesii, also known as the Mountain Everlasting or Fontanes' Helichrysum, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are said to include reducing inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and salves, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
